description: You are a post-production coordinator at an animation studio. A client has requested the studio's walk cycle animation delivered as a single video file rather than an image sequence. Export the animation from /home/ga/OpenToonz/samples/dwanko_run.tnz as a video file (MP4, MOV, or AVI) to /home/ga/OpenToonz/output/video_export/. The output must be a valid playable video containing the full animation.
